  ○ Day 3: Caro Realm Assault Awakener "Sorel," Wheel of Destiny "By Rose Alone."

  ○ Day 5: Aequor Realm Warden Awakener "Murphy," Wheel of Destiny "Shrouded Birth."

  ○ Day 11: Ultra Realm Chorus Awakener "Horla," Wheel of Destiny "The Last Verse."
  ○ Day 12: Chaos Realm Chorus Awakener "Ryker," Wheel of Destiny "Hour of Fortune."
  ○ Day 13: Chaos Realm Chorus Awakener "Hameln," Wheel of Destiny "Eternal Requiem."
  ○ Day 14: Assault Awakener of Caro Realm "Chain·Helot", Wheel of Destiny "Drowning in Crimson".
  ○ Day 15: Chaos Realm Chorus Awakener "Tawil," Wheel of Destiny "Wheel Unseen."
  ○ Day 16: Chaos Realm Chorus Awakener "Doll: Inferno," Wheel of Destiny "Manikin of Oblivion."
  ○ Day 17: Ultra Realm Chorus Awakener "Clementine," Wheel of Destiny "Veiled Anguish."
  ○ Day 18: Aequor Realm Warden Awakener "Corposant," Wheel of Destiny "Flamebound Navigator."
  ○ Day 19: Ultra Realm Warden Awakener "Castor," Wheel of Destiny "Unbearable Freedom."
  ○ Day 20: Caro Realm Assault Awakener "Doresain," Wheel of Destiny "Kiss of Repose."

○ Day 21: Chaos Realm Assault Awakener "Kathigu-Ra," Wheel of Destiny "Amber-Tinted Death."
  ○ Day 22: Caro Realm Chorus Awakener "Pickman," Wheel of Destiny "Paradoxical Realism."
